description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-sup/

A gentle eco-tour on Lake Naguri where you can experience the changing seasons and the lake's calm waters in a way that feels good for both mind and body. Paddle slowly across the water while learning about Naguri's ecosystem and natural beauty in an environmentally conscious way.

【Fee】 ¥4,000 per person (includes guide, insurance, SUP board rental)

【Capacity】 5 people

【Guide】 Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop staff

【What to bring】 Rash guard, swimsuit, board shorts, swim trunks, capri leggings, or leggings—anything you can move in while wet. *Life jackets are provided.

【More information】 Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop website https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: 🌊 Beginners welcome! Relaxing SUP experience at Lake Naguri—no gear needed
